title: MIFEM NIKI KDI YAVUYEHE?
summary:
MIFEM: INKURU Y'UBUVUGIZI BW'ABAGORE
mu Itorero rya Adventiste mu Rwanda
1. MIFEM Bivuga Iki?
Ijambo "MIFEM" rituruka mu rurimi rw'igifaransa "Ministère des Femmes" bivuga Ubuvugizi bw'Abagore mu Itorero rya Adventiste. Mu Rwanda, ijambo MIFEM rikoreshwa kwerekana akazi gakozwe n'abagore n'inkumi berekeje ubuzima bwabo gukorera Umwami wabo — Yesu Kristo. Motto yabo ivuga neza: "Nyirabana nta muntu adashoboye gukiza." Bose bahamagarirwa akazi kamwe, kuko bose baguzwe n'igiciro kimwe kitagira agaciro.
2. Inkomoko: Itorero rya Adventiste Ryageze mu Rwanda Gute?
Kugira ngo dusobanukirwe neza inkuru ya MIFEM, tugomba mbere gukurikira inkuru y'Itorero rya Adventiste mu Rwanda. Umwe mu bashinzi b'Itorero rya Adventiste mu Rwanda ni David Elie Delhove, umunyamision w'Umubelgika. Inkuru y'ubutumwa bwa Adventiste mu Rwanda itangira mu 1919, nyuma y'Intambara ya Mbere y'Isi Yose. Ntiyaje wenyine — yaherekejwe na Henri Monnier uturutse mu Busuwisi. Insibi ya mbere ya Adventiste mu Rwanda yashingwe na Delhove mu 1919, yise Insibi ya Gitwe, mu ntara y'Amajyepfo y'u Rwanda.
Delhove yari ashinzwe gukora mu misioni yo mu Afurika y'Uburasirazuba igihe Intambara ya Mbere yatangiraga mu 1914. Nyuma y'intambara, yagiraga umwete wo gutangira ubutumwa mu Rwanda, agira ati ibyo si amateka gusa — ni imirimo y'Imana. Mu 1960, kubera ko umubare w'Abaadventiste wari wagwiriye cyane, Rwanda na Burundi byahawe ishyirahamwe ryazo ryihariye, ryise Central African Union.
3. Abagore mu Itorero ry'Ibanze
Kuva mu ntangiriro z'Itorero rya Adventiste mu Rwanda, abagore bari mu mutima w'ubuzima bw'Itorero. Bari babigize mu buryo butanditse — bigishaga abana, batunganya imiryango yo gusenga, bagaherekeza abarwayi, bagashyigikira ubumwe bw'imbaga. Ariko mu myaka myinshi, akazi kabo ntikagiraga inyandiko n'imiterere ihuriweho.
Mu 1898, Ellen G. White yashishikarije Sarepta Henry gutangira gutunganya ubuvugizi bw'abagore mu Itorero rya Adventiste ku Nteko Nkuru y'Itorero. Ubwo buvugizi bw'abagore mu Itorero rya Adventiste ku rwego rw'isi yose bushingwe mu buryo bwite mu 1990, bugira imiterere n'inzira z'akazi zisobanutse.
4. MIFEM Ishingwa mu Rwanda
Mu bikorwa by'Itorero rya Adventiste mu Afurika francophone, Ubuvugizi bw'Abagore bwizwi nka MIFEM. Uko Itorero rya Adventiste ryagendaga rikura no gusambaza amashami yayo ahantu hanini h'u Rwanda, MIFEM yashingwaga mu nzego zose — kuva ku Rwanda Union Mission kugeza mu itorero rimwe na rimwe. Kuri ubu, Rwanda Union Mission ifite umunyamabanga w'Ubuvugizi bw'Abagore ukorana n'Ubuvugizi bw'Abana n'Ubuvugizi bw'Umuryango, bigaragaza ubuhamya bw'iri nama mu itorero.
Mu ntara zose z'u Rwanda — kuva mu Majyepfo kugeza mu Majyaruguru, kuva mu Burengerazuba kugeza mu Burasirazuba — amatsinda ya MIFEM yashingwaga mu itorero buri rimwe, yungurira imibereho y'abagore, abana n'amatorero bose.
5. Mu Mwijima w'Ubukangurambaga bwa 1994
Inkuru ya MIFEM ntishobora gukerekeza ubukangurambaga bwa 1994. Itorero rya Adventiste mu Rwanda ryahitanywe n'igihano gikomeye mu bagenzi, mu buyobozi, no mu bibanza by'imishinga. Abagore babuzwe abagabo, abana n'imiryango yose. Ariko kenshi kwari abo bagore nyine bakomaga guhuza ibifu, bagashyira imigati mu kanwa k'inzara, bagagarura inzira z'icyizere mu bwuzuzanye bw'abari barokotse.
Nyuma y'ubukangurambaga, Itorero rya Adventiste mu Rwanda ryagiye rikura cyane, risubira kubaka amatorero n'inzego z'imishinga, ritera imbere mu gutozwa kwa pastori n'ubuvugizi bw'urubyiruko. Abagore ba MIFEM bari mu kiganza cy'izo mpinduka.
6. Ubukiro n'Imikorere ya MIFEM Ubu
MIFEM mu Rwanda ikorana ibikorwa byinshi bigamije guteza imbere abagore mu buryo bw'umwuka no mu by'imibereho y'isi. Izo bikorwa bikubiyemo:
• Kwigisha abagore gukora sabuni, tofu, imyambaro n'ibindi bikorwa by'ubutunzi bw'ingufu kugira ngo bashobore kubaho neza.
• Gutegura amasengesho yo kwigishirizaho abagore n'inkumi aho baherekejwa n'inzobere zabo mu matorero atandukanye.
• Gutumanahana inkuru nziza ya Yesu — abagore n'inkumi bakina uruhare mu bikorwa by'ubutumwa no kunesha abantu.
• Gutera inkunga imfungwa no kugeza umugisha aho hanini — mu 2016, imfungwa 260 zo mu magereza ya Mpanga na Muhanga zabatizwa bitewe n'imirimo ya MIFEM.
• Gufasha abashoboye guhura n'ubukene babone intama — inkunga yatanzwe na MIFEM, Ubuvugizi bw'Abana n'Ubuvugizi bw'Umuryango.
7. Itorero Ryagwiriye Binyuze muri MIFEM
Ku wa 31 Kanama 2019, Rwanda Union Mission yagiranye isabukuru y'imyaka 100 y'ubutumwa bwa Adventiste mu Rwanda. Kuri ubu, Itorero rya Adventiste mu Rwanda rifite abakristo barenga 1,200,000 mu matorero arenga 1,971 — yabaye imwe mu mashyirahamwe ya Adventiste manini cyane mu Afurika. Abagore ba MIFEM bafite uruhare rukomeye muri icyo gukura kose.
Ijambo Rya Nyuma
MIFEM si itsinda gusa — ni inzira y'ubuzima, ni ijwi ry'abagore bafite imbaraga z'Imana, ni intoki zihagurukira abatishoboye. Kuva muri Gitwe mu 1919 kugeza mu 2025, abagore ba Adventiste mu Rwanda bagiye berekana ko "Nyirabana nta muntu adashoboye gukiza" — ubwo ni ubuhamya buhoraho.
— Imana ikomeze guha MIFEM imbaraga n'ubwenge mu gukorera itorero ryayo! —
author: Pr.Eric
